name: MCrates
author: Mrchlldev
description: MCrates is a cloning plugin from PiggyCrates, Make simple and customizable crates plugin, supporting an unlimited amount of crate types. support custom item by Customies?
readme_markdown:
MCrates

MCrates is a cloning plugin from PiggyCrates, Make simple and customizable crates plugin, supporting an unlimited amount of crate types. support custom item by Customies?

Feature:

  1. PiggyCustomEnchant Support.
  2. Support More Crate Blocks.
  3. Unlimited Crate Type
  4. Support Custom Item by Customies?
  5. Form Manager
  6. Easy to use

Depend:

  1. Commando by CortexPE
  2. libPiggyUpdateChecker by DaPigGuy
  3. InvMenu by Muqsit
  4. Customies by Customiesdevs
  5. FormAPI by Jojoe77777

Support crate blocks:

  1. Chest
  2. EnchantTable
  3. Shulker(bugs)
  4. Barrel
  5. Ender Chest
  6. Beacon
